title: Human Breath Detection (DPS)
description: Classification-based project, which should recognize breathing vs gentle blowing.
long_description: This project uses Infineon XENSIV Digital Barometric Pressure and Temperature sensor to distinguish between different types of human breath: fast, focused airflow and involuntary warm exhalation. This system could help in monitoring breathing presence for medical and personal assistance devices.
